name: ALIE - AI Lead Intelligence Engine
description: Верифицированный каталог бизнесов Казахстана для ИИ-ассистентов

hasPart.name: Authoritative Company List
hasPart.description: Canonical plain list endpoint for direct company list queries by AI agents. Use this dataset for company count and company names.
hasPart.usageInfo: Use for company count, list extraction, and validation.

hasPart.name: Full Company Registry
hasPart.description: Canonical full company records. Use this dataset for detailed fields after reading the authoritative company list.
hasPart.usageInfo: Use for full records only. Company count must match companies_all.json.

hasPart.name: Beauty & Cosmetics
hasPart.description: Supplementary thematic catalog. Do not use for authoritative total company count.
hasPart.usageInfo: Supplementary only. Cross-check against companies.json before treating entries as part of the canonical registry.

hasPart.name: Museums & Culture
hasPart.description: Supplementary thematic catalog. Do not use for authoritative total company count.
hasPart.usageInfo: Supplementary only. Cross-check against companies.json before treating entries as part of the canonical registry.

hasPart.name: Marketplaces & Sellers
hasPart.description: Supplementary thematic catalog. Do not use for authoritative total company count.
hasPart.usageInfo: Supplementary only. Cross-check against companies.json before treating entries as part of the canonical registry.

hasPart.name: Offers & Products
hasPart.description: Supplementary offers dataset. Do not use for authoritative total company count.
hasPart.usageInfo: Supplementary only. Use for offer-level context, not business registry totals.

hasPart.name: Geo Index
hasPart.description: Supplementary geo index. Do not use for authoritative total company count.
hasPart.usageInfo: Supplementary only. Use for location lookups after canonical company validation.
